zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Norris於1475年出生在英國艾可希 拉沃時，她的父親Sir John Norreys41歲，母親Millicent Ravenscroft46歲。她於大約1495年與Sir Edward Sulyard在英國英格蘭艾可希 拉沃結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1531年在英國素福爾可巴爾金享年56歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維瑟爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Norris于1475年出生在英国艾可希 拉沃时，她的父亲Sir John Norreys41岁，母亲Millicent Ravenscroft46岁。她于大约1495年与Sir Edward Sulyard在英国英格兰艾可希 拉沃结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1531年在英国素福爾可巴爾金享年56岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可維瑟爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Norris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

variants.name: Nurse
meanings: from Middle English norice, nurice ‘nurse; foster parent’ (Old French norrice, nurrice).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Norris was born in 1475, in High Laver, Essex, England, her father, Sir John Norreys, was 41 and her mother, Millicent Ravenscroft, was 46. She married Sir Edward Sulyard about 1495, in High Laver, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1531, in Barking, Suffolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Wetherden, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Norris est née en 1475, à High Laver, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Norreys, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Millicent Ravenscroft, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Sulyard environ 1495, à High Laver, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1531, à Barking, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Wetherden, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.High Laver, Essex, England, UK: High Laver, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Norris 1475 in High Laver, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Norreys 41 und ihre Mutter Millicent Ravenscroft 46. Sie hat um 1495 in High Laver, Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir Edward Sulyard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1531 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Barking, Suffolk, England und wurde in Wetherden, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Norris è nata il nel 1475 nel High Laver, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John Norreys, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Millicent Ravenscroft, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Sulyard circa 1495, nel High Laver, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1531, nel Barking, Suffolk, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Wetherden, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Norrisが1475年にイギリスエセックスヒグ ラバーで生まれた時，父Sir John Norreysは41歳，母Millicent Ravenscroftは46歳であった。約1495年にイギリスイギリスエセックスヒグ ラバーでSir Edward Sulyardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1531年にイギリススフォルクバーキングで56歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウエスエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Norris(이)가 1475년 영국 에세스 히그h 레이버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Norreys(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Ravenscroft(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 히그h 레이버에서 Sir Edward Sulyard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 영국 수폴크 바킨그에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 w더든에 묻혔다.

pt.High Laver, Essex, England, UK: High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Norris nasceu em 1475, em High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Norreys, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Ravenscroft, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Sulyard aproximadamente 1495, em High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1531, em Barking, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.High Laver, Essex, England, UK: High Laver, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Norris родилась в 1475 г. в местности хаи лавир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Norreys было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Millicent Ravenscroft, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Sulyard около 1495 г. в местности хаи лавир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1531 г. в местности баркинг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирден, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Norris nació en 1475, en High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Norreys, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Millicent Ravenscroft, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir Edward Sulyard aproximadamente 1495, en High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1531, en Barking, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
